🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 0.8m and onshore wind, you're more likely to find soup than a rideable wave today.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 0.8m and onshore breeze, it’s mostly getting sandblasted while paddling for closeouts today.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that wind against a pathetic 0.8m swell, Lagide's serving up a guaranteed sand-scrubbing experience today.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 0.8m lumps might offer a brief slide, but I've seen better days and better coffee.

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 0.8m waves will be smaller than my ego after that wind gets hold of them.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
